title: Campfires: Refueled
description: Refined campfire designs with wood-specific textures and clean unlit appearances for both variants.
body:
# Campfires: Refueled
*Redesigns campfires with wood type variations and improved unlit appearances for more aesthetically pleasing outdoor builds.*

## Features
  - Oak log textures for standard campfires
  - Spruce log design for soul campfires
  - Soul soil replacement for ash in soul campfires
  - Clean, ash-less appearance for all unlit campfires

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
